heading: Deputy Administrator
label: 3614 Deputy Administrator
notes: References in TextLevel IV of the Executive Schedule, referred to in subsec. (b), is set out in , Government Organization and Employees.section 5315 of Title 5

Amendments1996— struck out “and Chief Engineer” after “Deputy Administrator” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 104–201“(a) There shall be a Deputy Administrator and a Chief Engineer of the Commission, both of whom shall be appointed by the President. The Deputy Administrator and the Chief Engineer shall perform such duties as may be prescribed by the President.“(b) The Deputy Administrator and the Chief Engineer shall each be paid compensation at a rate of pay established by the President which does not exceed the rate of basic pay in effect for grade GS–18 of the General Schedule under , and, if eligible, shall each be paid the overseas recruitment or retention differential provided for in .”section 5332 of title 5section 3657 of this title1990—Subsec. (b). inserted before period at end “, and, if eligible, shall each be paid the overseas recruitment or retention differential provided for in ”.Pub. L. 101–510section 3657 of this title

children.heading: Appointment and duties
children.label: a Appointment and duties
children.text: There shall be a Deputy Administrator of the Commission who shall be appointed by the President. The Deputy Administrator shall perform such duties as may be prescribed by the Board.

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: b Compensation
children.text: The Deputy Administrator shall be paid compensation at a rate of pay, established by the Board, which does not exceed the rate of basic pay in effect for level IV of the Executive Schedule, and, if eligible, shall be paid the overseas recruitment and retention differential provided for in .section 3657 of this title
